name: Almejas a La Creme Agria
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt & white pepper CLAMS 2 tablespoons Butter 1/4 cup Onion; chopped 40 Fresh Manila clams
2. Clams in Cream Cheese Sauce:
a. Combine sauce ingredients in a blender.
b. Reduce in a saucepan until slightly thickened.
3. CLAMS:
a. Melt butter in a large saute pan or skillet.
b. Add onion and saute lightly.
c. Add clams and saute until shells open fully.
d. Add sauce to pan, heat through, and serve.
